boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: substation relay setting update.

final_answer: Action may proceed. The controlling control record states the required dependency is current and exact, and the policy allows execution only when current source records close the exact boundary. The cautionary notes do not override the control record, so no blocker remains for the substation relay setting update.
